title: Property Consultant - L&T Realty - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - L&T Realty - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
L&T Realty has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Srinagar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About L&T Realty:
L&T Realty is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Realty!
